events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need assess trench protection commercial project. Scenario: spoil pile within 2 ft of edge. Work rough-complete. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart P. Need estimate measurable condition and state why out of tolerance.

We need know OSHA 1926 Subpart P requirements for spoil piles. In excavations, spoil and equipment must be kept at least 2 feet from edge? Actually OSHA 1926.651(j)(2): Spoil, equipment, and other materials that can fall into excavation must be set back at least 2 feet from the edge. Wait: "Spoil and other materials shall not be placed closer than 2 feet from the edge of the excavation." Let's verify. 1926.651(j)(2): "Spoil, equipment, and other materials that can fall into the excavation shall be set back at least 2 feet from the edge of the excavation." So within 2 ft of edge means non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high due to cave-in hazard. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80. Value 2 (distance in feet). Confidence high. Findings: spoil pile located less than/equal to 2 ft from trench edge, violating minimum setback. Actions: relocate spoil/materials at least 2 ft back from edge, inspect trench protection, retrain crew. Rationale: OSHA requires minimum 2 ft setback; observed within 2 ft increases surcharge load and cave-in risk. References: OSHA 1926.651(j)(2). Need ensure JSON shape. Use arrays. Work stage rough-complete. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. value 2. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty list, workable empty list. event_time 0.0 rate 0.0. confidence 0.95. percent_complete 80. risk high. decision fail.

Need output exactly one valid JSON object, no prose.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 2,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Spoil pile is within 2 ft of the trench edge, failing the required minimum setback."],
  "actions": ["Immediately relocate the spoil pile and any other materials at least 2 ft back from the trench edge.", "Inspect trench protection and adjacent soil for surcharge-induced instability.", "Brief the crew on excavation setback requirements before resuming work."],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926.651(j)(2) requires spoil and materials to be set back at least 2 feet from the edge of an excavation. A spoil pile within 2 ft adds surcharge load, increasing the risk of a cave-in and striking workers in the trench.",
  "references": ["OSHA 1926.651(j)(2)"]
}
